_comment: Sensor baseline accuracy values. These are modeling ASSUMPTIONS, not empirically validated constants. Calibrate against your operational field data before production use.

confidence_bounds._comment: min_eta: the lowest reliability an observation can have, regardless of degradation. Must be > 0.5 for Bayesian update to be directionally meaningful. Make configurable for adversarial / extreme-degradation scenarios.

age_decay_rates_per_min._comment: How fast observation reliability decays with age. Disaster-specific. Higher = faster decay. Modeling assumption.
